batch: Batch145 — Hosted Proof Artifact Upload Closure
phase: P0 hosted/public proof evidence packaging after Batch144 local/source closure
selectedBecause: Batch144 closed local/source P0/P1 as a strong candidate, but hosted/public proof remains blocked. The next blocker is making GitHub Actions/Vercel hosted proof artifacts auditable, especially real visual smoke screenshots, without claiming public rollout or production readiness.
scope: Preserve Batch144 local/source closure claim boundaries.
Require the P0 hosted final proof workflow to upload JSON reports, Markdown checklists, and real visual smoke screenshot PNG files.

Keep hosted proof blocked unless Node24 CI provenance, APP_URL strict smoke, hosted save/export smoke, visual smoke screenshots, P0-100 release proof, capture board, and public rollout readiness all pass.
Do not add AI, payment, fake verified data, community auto-public, or role self-selection.

requiredSteps: Capture real visual smoke evidence with Chromium
Run hosted CI final proof runner

allowed: Batch145 improves hosted proof artifact upload/auditability source-level.
The workflow is prepared to preserve screenshot evidence when run on GitHub Actions with a hosted URL.
Local/source P0/P1 remains a closed source candidate only within source/local evidence.
blocked: Không nói hosted proof closed khi chưa có workflow run Node24 + APP_URL + artifacts uploaded.
Không nói public rollout allowed khi public-rollout readiness còn false.
Không nói production-ready nếu chưa có production DB/security/legal review.
Không nói visual smoke pass nếu thiếu screenshot PNG thật.
